task.title: Strengthen UX Gremlin workflow sequencing
task.goal: Add an explicit workflow-status gate so UX Gremlin cannot proceed to Playwright execution before the generated spec is implemented.
task.scope: Only the ux-gremlin plugin workflow script, docs, agent instructions, instruction fragments, and tests.
non_goals: Do not change generated selector quality or app-specific Playwright implementation.
Do not remove failing-by-default generated spec behavior.
Do not change unrelated plugins or marketplace metadata.

assumptions.statement: The UX Gremlin plugin already owns the plan validator, Playwright generator, ingest, report, and gate commands in one Node ESM script.
assumptions.verification_method: Read the plugin script and package metadata.
evidence: plugins/ux-gremlin/package.json exposes skills/ux-gremlin/scripts/ux-gremlin.mjs as the bin.
plugins/ux-gremlin/skills/ux-gremlin/scripts/ux-gremlin.mjs contains command handlers for check, coverage, generate-playwright, ingest, report, and gate.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: The workflow gate could be added in the wrong location or fail to integrate with existing commands.
assumptions.decision: Add workflow-status to the existing ux-gremlin.mjs command dispatcher.

assumptions.statement: The current generated spec intentionally contains TODO placeholders and active requireImplementation calls, so an execution readiness gate can detect incomplete generated output without weakening CI behavior.
assumptions.verification_method: Read writeGeneratedSpec and existing tests for generated spec behavior.
evidence: writeGeneratedSpec emits TODO comments and requireImplementation calls for baseline and scenarios.
Existing test generated spec is failing-by-default with scenario annotations asserts requireImplementation and scenario/risk annotations are present.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: The new gate might reject valid specs or miss incomplete ones.
assumptions.decision: Fail execute readiness when generated placeholders or active requireImplementation calls remain.

assumptions.statement: The user-facing workflow gap is in orchestration/documentation, not in plan validation itself.
assumptions.verification_method: Run existing plugin tests and inspect skill/agent workflow instructions.
evidence: npm test in plugins/ux-gremlin passed 18 tests before implementation.
SKILL.md and ux-gremlin.agent.md describe baseline-first and generate-before-execution, but do not expose a machine-checkable spec implementation gate.
assumptions.impact_if_wrong: The implementation could overreach into plan/schema behavior instead of fixing the sequencing problem.
assumptions.decision: Keep plan validation behavior intact and add workflow phase readiness checks plus workflow instructions.

final_verification.notes: UX Gremlin workflow-status command, execute readiness gate, docs, and regression tests passed package validation and guardrail checks.
